title: lavandula angustifolia var. delphinensis
intro: Lavandula angustifolia var. delphinensis, also known as Delphinium Lavender, is a subspecies of the English lavender plant that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its calming and soothing properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of linalool and linalyl acetate, making it a popular choice for its medicinal and aromatherapeutic applications. The health benefits of Lavandula angustifolia var. delphinensis include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and promoting relaxation, as well as its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, dried flowers, and infusions, which can be used in a variety of ways, such as in potpourri, perfumes, and as a natural remedy for various health issues.
